import pandas as pd
import gc


def process_sales_data(filepath: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = pd.read_csv(filepath)
    df = df[df["amount"] > 0]
    df = df.groupby("region").agg({"amount": "sum"})
    df = df.sort_values("amount", ascending=False)
    df = df.assign(rank=range(1, len(df) + 1))
    return df.reset_index()


def enrich_customer_data(customers: pd.DataFrame, orders: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    merged = customers.merge(orders, on="customer_id")
    del orders
    merged = merged[merged["status"] == "completed"]
    aggregated = merged.groupby("customer_id").agg({"total": "sum", "order_id": "count"})
    del merged
    gc.collect()
    aggregated = aggregated.rename(columns={"total": "total_spent", "order_id": "order_count"})
    return customers.merge(aggregated, on="customer_id", how="left")
